title: gilia gracilis subsp. humilis
intro: Gilia gracilis subsp. humilis, also known as the small-flowered gilia, is a subspecies of the Gilia gracilis plant, belonging to the Polemoniaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Gilia gracilis subsp. humilis include its potential to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
